data.title: Tron Hits $80.2B Stablecoin Milestone After Tether Mints 1B USDT On The Network
data.description:
the heldTron has emerged as one of the strongest performers during the latest market downturn, showing a level of resilience rarely seen among major altcoins. While most large-cap cryptocurrencies have suffered drawdowns of 40% or more since August, Tron has limited its losses to just 24%, outperforming nearly the entire altcoin sector. This relative strength highlights the network’s unique positioning and the steady demand it continues to attract despite broader market weakness. Related Reading: Bitcoin Liquidation Dominance Hits Multi-Year High: The Real Cause Behind BTC’s Breakdown A major factor behind this resilience is Tron’s growing dominance in the stablecoin ecosystem
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/tron-trx/tron-hits-80-2b-stablecoin-milestone-after-tether-mints-1b-usdt-on-the-network/

data.title: SEC Blocks 3–5x Leveraged Crypto ETFs in Warning to Issuers – Here Is Why Regulators Hit Pause
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has made the decision to block the approval of 3 to 5 times leveraged cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs), issuing a strong warning to the financial issuers of such products. This action has raised significant concerns within the investment community, prompting regulators to hit the brakes on the introduction of these highly speculative investment vehicles. Here, we delve into the reasons behind this regulatory pause, exploring the potential risks involved, the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market, and the SEC's commitment to protecting investors from products that may carry excessive risk.
source: https://blocknews.com/sec-blocks-3-5x-leveraged-crypto-etfs-in-warning-to-issuers-here-is-why-regulators-hit-pause/

data.title: XRP Price Movement Signals Potential Trend Shift
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, XRP has defended its $2 psychological floor this week, rebounding nearly 6% on Tuesday following a brief liquidity sweep on Monday. Despite remaining in a multimonth downtrend since July, the $2.28–$2.30 resistance band now serves as a pivotal point for potential bullish continuation. A bullish daily close above $2.30 would confirm a break of structure, possibly leading to a move toward $2.58. XRP has shown aggressive movement between liquidity pockets in 2025, increasing the likelihood of a significant rally. Mildly negative funding and weakened open interest indicate bearish conditions, but reclaiming the $2.22–$2.30 range could trigger a squeeze-driven trend reversal.

XRP's bounce to $2.17 occurred after tapping the fair value gap just beneath $2, an area created during the Nov. 21 rebound from $1.80. This retest suggests that buyers remain active at discounted pricing zones even within a broader downtrend. Structurally, XRP continues to print lower highs, but the compression below $2.30 resembles a coil forming under a major decision point. A daily close above $2.30 would mark the first trend shift since July, confirming a bullish break of the structure and clearing a path toward the next liquidity cluster at $2.58. The region between $2.34 and $2.42 is mapped as a sell-side fair value gap, where early profit-taking is likely. However, XRP's historical price behavior in 2025 has been characterized by forceful moves from one extreme liquidity pocket to the next, suggesting that once momentum flips, XRP tends to overshoot intermediate resistance as it hunts liquidity, making $2.58 an extended target.

Funding dynamics and trader sentiment are split, with analyst Pelin Ay highlighting that XRP funding rates remain predominantly negative, indicating short positioning dominates the futures market. With both price and funding declining together, sentiment is reinforcing the downtrend, raising the probability of a retest of the $2.00–$1.90 zone unless structure shifts. If funding drops below –0.01, Ay believes the path toward $1.90 becomes increasingly likely. Still, deepening negative funding often precedes liquidity raids, in which case XRP could briefly consolidate before driving above $2.30. Meanwhile, crypto trader Dom noted signs of an emerging reversal, suggesting trend fatigue. A higher low has finally printed, and reclaiming the monthly relative volume-weighted average price at $2.22 would signal that bullish rotation is underway, paving the way toward the $2.50 region. However, the trader warned that if the setup fails, acceptance under $2 is next, and the end of the year could be challenging.

data.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Tells Joe Rogan AI Race Is Real, But It Won’t Have a Clear Winner
data.description:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang discussed the competitive landscape of artificial intelligence during an interview with Joe Rogan, emphasizing that while the race to develop advanced AI technologies is indeed a significant and ongoing reality, it is unlikely that there will be a definitive winner emerging from this competition. Huang elaborated on the complexities and challenges involved in AI development, suggesting that multiple companies and organizations will continue to make substantial contributions to the field, rather than one entity dominating the market.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2025/12/03/nvidia-ceo-jensen-huang-tells-joe-rogan-ai-race-is-real-but-it-won-t-have-a-clear-winner
